content.fact_text: Implements a robust, production-ready ReconciliationWorker that ensures eventual consistency between PostgreSQL inventory and Kafka event logs with distributed locking and circuit breakers.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements background inventory reconciliation by snapshotting PostgreSQL inventory state and auditing it against Kafka event streams. Uses Redis for distributed locking to ensure single-instance processing per SKU range. Resolves discrepancies by updating database state and emitting audit events to Kafka. Implements circuit breakers for all external network dependencies.
provenance_data.utility: Provides automated inventory reconciliation to ensure eventual consistency between the PostgreSQL database and Kafka event streams in a high-concurrency e-commerce environment.
